name: NeMo Guardrails
allowed_use_boundary: Use as programmable conversational and tool-interaction rail crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat rail pass or block outcomes as policy legitimacy, standing, certification, or execution authority.
claims: NeMo Guardrails provides programmable controls for conversational flows, content, topics, retrieval, and tool interactions around LLM applications.
non_claims: NeMo Guardrails does not prove transition admissibility.
A rail pass does not establish current delegation.
A rail block is not StegVerse certification.

transition_table_mapping.allowed_use_boundary: runtime rail and intervention evidence only
transition_table_mapping.claims: programmable controls for flows, content, topics, retrieval, and tool interactions
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no policy legitimacy, delegation, standing, certification, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.input_artifact_type: rail configuration, model input, retrieval context, or tool interaction
transition_table_mapping.output_artifact_type: rail pass, block, redirection, or intervention evidence
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: configured runtime actors and integrations; authority not established
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: official documentation plus local bounded crosswalk
transition_table_mapping.receipt_or_trace_model: rail configuration, runtime trace, and local compatibility record
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: configuration, models, integrations, context, and output required
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: rail evidence may inform standing and policy review
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: preparation, commitment, execution-boundary, and unknown-trajectory evidence
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: missing rail configuration, model or integration version, runtime context, raw output, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: source reference or version is missing
rail configuration or runtime dependencies are absent
behavior is generalized beyond observed configuration
comparative behavior is claimed without executable evidence
